name: wandermatch
description: WanderMatch MERN website, Express API, and React Native mobile app.

scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix mobile run typecheck
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix mobile install
